_note: User/agent-editable config. Seeded from tools/ on first activation. Edits here persist across extension updates — deployed to comfyai/_extension/hiddenswitch/config/ on each activation. Add HF or CivitAI models to the server's known-model list here.

_format.keys: ComfyUI folder names: checkpoints, diffusion_models, loras, vae, clip, controlnet, upscale_models, clip_vision, style_models
_format.civitai_ids: Find model_id and model_version_id in the CivitAI URL: civitai.com/models/<model_id>?modelVersionId=<model_version_id>
